---
title: "deep learning"
author: "Sydney Coughlan"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: pdf_document
---

# Final Pass: Deep Network

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(torch)
library(tidyverse)
set.seed(472)

# all categorical variables with different types/ranges, using embedding so that it won't interpret them as numeric
dfOG <- read_csv("~/Downloads/adultdf (1)(adultdf).csv")

# clean for only relevant variables
keep_vars <- c(
"life_satis",
"worthless_mh",
"effort_mh",
"hopeless_mh",
"restless_mh",
"nervous_mh",
"sad_mh",
"needther_mh",
"dlyther_mh",
"nowther_mh",
"pastther_mh",
"lonely_mh",
"tired_mh",
"pyschdist_mh",
"dep_mh",
"anx_mh",


"genhealth_status",
"func_status",
"dis_status",
"work_lim",
"headmood_cond", 
"dazedmem_cond", 
"anyinjury_cond", 
"repstrain_cond", 
"hndfin_df", 
"selfcare_df", 
"cogmem_df", 
"com_df", 
"walk_df", 
"vision_df", 
"taste_df",
"smell_df",
"hear_df",
"weakhlth_cond",
"weakimm_cond",
"psor_ever",          
"kidweak_ever",
"dep_ever",
"anx_ever",
"arth_ever",
"copd_ever",
"dib_ever",
"dib_type",
"gesdib_ever",
"predib_ever",
"asth_ever",
"str_ever",
"attack_ever",
"chd_ever",
"chl_ever",
"hyp_ever",

"coldflu_sym",
"covid_ever",
"curresp_sym",
"sunburn_sym",

"num_can", 
"can_ever", 

"cover_65", 
"cover_u65", 
"cover_status", 
"house_cost", 
"bill_cost", 
"fdbalance_cost", 
"needmrx_cost", 
"delayrx_cost", 
"lessrx_cost", 
"skiprx_cost", 
"needmed_cost", 
"meddl12m", 
"covtype_none", 
"covtype_oth", 
"covtype_ss", 
"covtype_ihs", 
"covtype_mil", 
"covtype_chip", 
"covtype_maid", 
"covtype_mgap", 
"covtype_mcare", 
"covtype_priv", 

"agep", 
"pov_ratio", 
"educ_status", 
"race", 
"sex", 
"marital_status", 
"region", 
"urb_rural", 

"anymedcare")

df <- dfOG %>%
  select(all_of(keep_vars))

# handling NA's by adding one missing category
for (col in keep_vars) {
  max_val <- max(df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  df[[col]][is.na(df[[col]])] <- max_val + 1
}

# clear up for set up 
in_vars <- c(
"life_satis",
"worthless_mh",
"effort_mh",
"hopeless_mh",
"restless_mh",
"nervous_mh",
"sad_mh",
"needther_mh",
"dlyther_mh",
"nowther_mh",
"pastther_mh",
"lonely_mh",
"tired_mh",
"pyschdist_mh",
"dep_mh",
"anx_mh",


"genhealth_status",
"func_status",
"dis_status",
"work_lim",
"headmood_cond", 
"dazedmem_cond", 
"anyinjury_cond", 
"repstrain_cond", 
"hndfin_df", 
"selfcare_df", 
"cogmem_df", 
"com_df", 
"walk_df", 
"vision_df", 
"taste_df",
"smell_df",
"hear_df",
"weakhlth_cond",
"weakimm_cond",
"psor_ever",          
"kidweak_ever",
"dep_ever",
"anx_ever",
"arth_ever",
"copd_ever",
"dib_ever",
"dib_type",
"gesdib_ever",
"predib_ever",
"asth_ever",
"str_ever",
"attack_ever",
"chd_ever",
"chl_ever",
"hyp_ever",

"coldflu_sym",
"covid_ever",
"curresp_sym",
"sunburn_sym",

"num_can", 
"can_ever", 

"cover_65", 
"cover_u65", 
"cover_status", 
"house_cost", 
"bill_cost", 
"fdbalance_cost", 
"needmrx_cost", 
"delayrx_cost", 
"lessrx_cost", 
"skiprx_cost", 
"needmed_cost", 
"meddl12m", 
"covtype_none", 
"covtype_oth", 
"covtype_ss", 
"covtype_ihs", 
"covtype_mil", 
"covtype_chip", 
"covtype_maid", 
"covtype_mgap", 
"covtype_mcare", 
"covtype_priv", 

"educ_status", 
"race", 
"sex", 
"marital_status", 
"region", 
"urb_rural")

target_var <- "anymedcare"

# features as tensor
feature_tensors <- lapply(df[in_vars], function(x) {
  x <- as.integer(x)                 
  max_val <- max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  x[is.na(x)] <- max_val + 1 
  # shifted all indices by +1
  x <- x + 1                          
  torch_tensor(x, dtype = torch_long())
})

# target tensor
y <- torch_tensor(as.integer(df[[target_var]]), dtype = torch_float())

# split train data

n <- nrow(df)
train_idx <- sample(1:n, size = 0.8 * n)

train_df <- df[train_idx, ]
test_df  <- df[-train_idx, ]

train_features <- lapply(train_df[in_vars], function(x) {
  torch_tensor(as.integer(x) + 1L, dtype = torch_long())
})

test_features <- lapply(test_df[in_vars], function(x) {
  torch_tensor(as.integer(x) + 1L, dtype = torch_long())
})

train_y <- torch_tensor(as.numeric(train_df[[target_var]]), dtype = torch_float())
test_y  <- torch_tensor(as.numeric(test_df[[target_var]]), dtype = torch_float())

# defining 
num_categories <- sapply(train_df[in_vars], function(x) max(as.integer(x))) + 1
embedding_dims <- pmin(10, ceiling(num_categories / 3))

num_categories
embedding_dims

# custom module
mymodel <- nn_module(
  "care_predictor",
  
  initialize = function(
    num_categories, embedding_dims,num_numeric, hidden_dims = c(128, 64, 32)) {
    self$dropout <- nn_dropout(p = 0.6)
    self$embeddings <- nn_module_list(
      lapply(1:length(num_categories), function(i) {
        nn_embedding(num_embeddings = num_categories[i], 
                     embedding_dim = embedding_dims[i])
      })
    )
    
    total_emb_dim <- sum(embedding_dims)
    all_dims <- c(total_emb_dim + num_numeric, hidden_dims)
    
    self$hidden_layers <- nn_module_list(
      lapply(1:(length(all_dims) - 1), function(i) {
        nn_linear(all_dims[i], all_dims[i + 1])
      })
    )
    
    # batch norm initialized with output dim of each hidden layer
    self$bn_layers <- nn_module_list(
      lapply(hidden_dims, function(d) nn_batch_norm1d(d))
    )
    
    self$output <- nn_linear(hidden_dims[length(hidden_dims)], 1)
  },
  
  forward = function(x_cat, x_num) {
    embedded <- lapply(1:length(x_cat), 
                       function(i) self$embeddings[[i]](x_cat[[i]]))
    
    x <- torch_cat(c(embedded, list(x_num)), dim = 2)
    for (i in 1:length(self$hidden_layers)) {
      x <- self$hidden_layers[[i]](x)  
      x <- self$bn_layers[[i]](x)     
      x <- torch_relu(x)        
      x <- self$dropout(x)             
    }
    
    x <- torch_sigmoid(self$output(x))
    x$squeeze(2)
  }
)

#setting up numeric vars
numeric_vars <- c("agep", "pov_ratio")

# normalize to 0-1 range
normalize <- function(x) (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))

# proper normalization
train_mins <- sapply(train_df[numeric_vars], min)
train_maxs <- sapply(train_df[numeric_vars], max)

normalize_with_params <- function(df, vars, mins, maxs) {
  matrix(mapply(function(x, mn, mx) (x - mn) / (mx - mn),
                df[vars], mins, maxs), ncol = length(vars))
}

train_numeric <- torch_tensor(
  normalize_with_params(train_df, numeric_vars, train_mins, train_maxs),
  dtype = torch_float()
)

test_numeric <- torch_tensor(
  normalize_with_params(test_df, numeric_vars, train_mins, train_maxs),
  dtype = torch_float()
)

# initialized with 3 hidden layers
model <- mymodel(
  num_categories = num_categories,
  embedding_dims = embedding_dims,
  num_numeric = length(numeric_vars),
  hidden_dims = c(64, 32, 16)
)

optimizer <- optim_adam(model$parameters, lr = 0.001, weight_decay = 1e-2)

loss_fn <- nn_bce_loss()

num_epochs <- 75
batch_size <- 256
n_train <- length(train_y)

# initialized tracking vectors before the loop
train_losses <- numeric(num_epochs)
test_losses  <- numeric(num_epochs)
train_accs   <- numeric(num_epochs)
test_accs    <- numeric(num_epochs)

for (epoch in 1:num_epochs) {
  model$train()
  idx <- sample(1:n_train)

  for (start in seq(1, n_train, by = batch_size)) {
  batch_idx <- idx[start:min(start + batch_size - 1, n_train)]
  batch_x_cat <- lapply(train_features, function(f) f[batch_idx])
  batch_x_num <- train_numeric[batch_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  batch_y <- train_y[batch_idx]

  optimizer$zero_grad()
  preds <- model(batch_x_cat, batch_x_num)$squeeze()
  loss  <- loss_fn(preds, batch_y)
  loss$backward()
  optimizer$step()
  }

  # epoch metrics
  model$eval()
  with_no_grad({
    train_preds_epoch <- model(train_features, train_numeric)$squeeze()
    test_preds_epoch  <- model(test_features, test_numeric)$squeeze()
  })

  train_losses[epoch] <- loss_fn(train_preds_epoch, train_y)$item()
  test_losses[epoch]  <- loss_fn(test_preds_epoch, test_y)$item()
  train_accs[epoch]   <- ((train_preds_epoch > 0.5)$to(
    dtype = torch_float()) == train_y)$to(dtype = torch_float())$mean()$item()
  test_accs[epoch]    <- ((test_preds_epoch > 0.5)$to(
    dtype = torch_float()) == test_y)$to(dtype = torch_float())$mean()$item()

  if (epoch %% 5 == 0) {
    cat(sprintf(
      "Epoch %d | Train Loss: %.4f | Test Loss: %.4f | Test Acc: %.4f\n",
                epoch, train_losses[epoch], test_losses[epoch], 
      test_accs[epoch]))
  }
}

model$eval()

with_no_grad({
  test_preds <- model(test_features, test_numeric)$squeeze()
})

results_df <- test_df %>%
  mutate(
    pred_prob  = as.numeric(test_preds),
    anymedcare = as.numeric(anymedcare)
)

test_pred_class <- (test_preds > 0.5)$to(dtype = torch_float())
accuracy <- (test_pred_class == test_y)$to(dtype = torch_float())$mean()
accuracy$item()
pred_probs <- as.numeric(test_preds)

# probability distribution
prob_df <- data.frame(predicted_prob = as.numeric(test_preds))
ggplot(prob_df, aes(x = predicted_prob)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "lightblue", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Predicted Probabilities",
    x = "Predicted Probability",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

metrics_df <- data.frame(
  epoch      = rep(1:num_epochs, 2),
  loss       = c(train_losses, test_losses),
  accuracy   = c(train_accs, test_accs),
  split      = rep(c("train", "test"), each = num_epochs)
)

# loss curve
ggplot(metrics_df, aes(x = epoch, y = loss, color = split)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Training vs Test Loss", x = "Epoch", y = "BCE Loss", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

# accuracy curve
ggplot(metrics_df, aes(x = epoch, y = accuracy, color = split)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Training vs Test Accuracy", x = "Epoch", y = "Accuracy", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(pROC)
set.seed(472)

# permutation importance
test_y_vec    <- as.numeric(test_y)
test_preds_vec <- as.numeric(test_preds)

baseline_acc <- mean((test_preds_vec > 0.5) == test_y_vec)

perm_importance <- sapply(in_vars, function(var) {
  temp_df <- test_df
  
  temp_df[[var]] <- sample(temp_df[[var]])
  
  temp_features <- lapply(temp_df[in_vars], function(x) {
    torch_tensor(as.integer(x) + 1L, dtype = torch_long())
  })
  
  temp_numeric <- torch_tensor(
    normalize_with_params(temp_df, numeric_vars, train_mins, train_maxs),
    dtype = torch_float()
  )
  
  with_no_grad({
    preds <- model(temp_features, temp_numeric)$squeeze()
  })
  
  preds_vec <- as.numeric(preds)
  acc <- mean((preds_vec > 0.5) == test_y_vec)
  
  baseline_acc - acc
})

# permutation importance plot
importance_df <- data.frame(
  variable = in_vars,
  importance = perm_importance
) %>%
  arrange(desc(importance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

ggplot(importance_df, aes(x = reorder(variable, importance), y = importance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "skyblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Neural Network Feature Importance (Permutation)",
       x = NULL, y = "Drop in Accuracy") +
  theme_minimal()

# performance table
roc_obj <- roc(test_y_vec, test_preds_vec)
auc_val <- auc(roc_obj)

final_loss <- test_losses[num_epochs]
final_acc  <- test_accs[num_epochs]

null_acc <- max(mean(test_y_vec), 1 - mean(test_y_vec))

performance_table <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Test Accuracy", "Null Model Baseline", "Improvement Over Baseline",
             "Test BCE Loss", "AUC-ROC"),
  Value  = c(round(final_acc, 3), round(null_acc, 3),
             round(final_acc - null_acc, 3),
             round(final_loss, 3), round(auc_val, 3))
)

kable(performance_table,
      align   = c("l", "c"),
      caption = "Deep Entity Embedding Neural Network - Model Performance Summary")

# ROC curve
roc_df <- data.frame(
  specificity = rev(roc_obj$specificities),
  sensitivity = rev(roc_obj$sensitivities)
)

ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0.25,
           label = paste0("AUC = ", round(auc_val, 3)),
           size = 4.5, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "ROC Curve - Predicted Medical Care Utilization",
       x = "False Positive Rate (1 - Specificity)",
       y = "True Positive Rate (Sensitivity)") +
  theme_minimal()

# conditions and seeking care table
condition_categories <- list(
  "Mobility & Physical Function" = c("walk_df", "hndfin_df", "selfcare_df", 
                                      "repstrain_cond", "anyinjury_cond"),
  "Cognitive & Mental Health"    = c("dep_ever", "anx_ever", "cogmem_df",
                                      "headmood_cond", "dazedmem_cond"),
  "Sensory"                      = c("vision_df", "hear_df", "smell_df", 
                                      "taste_df", "com_df"),
  "Respiratory"                  = c("asth_ever", "copd_ever", "curresp_sym", 
                                      "coldflu_sym"),
  "Cardiovascular"               = c("hyp_ever", "chd_ever", "str_ever", 
                                      "attack_ever"),
  "Metabolic & Endocrine"        = c("dib_ever", "gesdib_ever", 
                                      "predib_ever", "chl_ever"),
  "Immune & Inflammatory"        = c("arth_ever", "weakimm_cond", "weakhlth_cond",
                                      "psor_ever", "kidweak_ever"),
  "Cancer"                       = c("can_ever"),
  "Infectious Disease"           = c("covid_ever")
)

category_rows <- lapply(names(condition_categories), function(cat_name) {
  vars <- condition_categories[[cat_name]]
  vars <- vars[vars %in% names(results_df)]
  
  any_condition <- rowSums(
    sapply(vars, function(v) as.integer(results_df[[v]]) == 1)
  ) > 0
  
  subset_df <- results_df[any_condition, ]
  
  data.frame(
    category    = cat_name,
    mean_pred   = mean(subset_df$pred_prob),
    actual_rate = mean(as.numeric(subset_df$anymedcare)),
    n           = nrow(subset_df)
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

category_rows %>%
  rename(
    "Health Condition Category"  = category,
    "Mean Predicted Probability" = mean_pred,
    "Actual Utilization Rate"    = actual_rate,
    "N"                          = n
  ) %>%
  kable(
    digits  = 3,
    align   = c("l", "c", "c", "c"),
    caption = "Predicted and Actual Medical Visit Rate by Health Condition"
  )

# conditions plot
category_rows %>%
  rename(
    "Health Condition Category"  = category,
    "Mean Predicted Probability" = mean_pred,
    "Actual Utilization Rate"    = actual_rate,
    "N"                          = n
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`Health Condition Category`, `Actual Utilization Rate`),
             y = `Actual Utilization Rate`)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(aes(y = `Mean Predicted Probability`),
             color = "coral", size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title    = "Medical Visit Rate by Health Condition Category",
       subtitle = "Bars = actual rate, points = model predicted probability",
       x = NULL, y = "Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

# insurance type table
insurance_vars  <- c("covtype_priv", "covtype_mcare", "covtype_maid",
                     "covtype_mil",  "covtype_ss",    "covtype_none")

insurance_labels <- c("Private Insurance", "Medicare", "Medicaid",
                      "Military / VA",     "State Supplement", "Uninsured")

insurance_summary <- mapply(function(var, label) {
  results_df %>%
    group_by(coverage = .data[[var]]) %>%
    summarise(
      actual_rate = mean(as.numeric(anymedcare)),
      mean_pred   = mean(pred_prob),
      n           = n(),
      .groups     = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      insurance_type = label,
      coverage = case_when(
        coverage == 1 ~ "Yes",
        coverage == 2 ~ "No",
        TRUE          ~ "Unknown"
      )
    )
}, insurance_vars, insurance_labels, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

insurance_df <- bind_rows(insurance_summary) %>%
  filter(coverage == "Yes") %>%
  select(insurance_type, actual_rate, mean_pred, n) %>%
  arrange(desc(actual_rate)) %>%
  rename(
    "Insurance Type"             = insurance_type,
    "Actual Utilization Rate"    = actual_rate,
    "Mean Predicted Probability" = mean_pred,
    "N"                          = n
  )

kable(insurance_df,
      digits  = 3,
      align   = c("l", "c", "c", "c"),
      caption = "Predicted and Actual Medical Visit Rate by Insurance Type")

# insurance plot
insurance_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`Insurance Type`, `Actual Utilization Rate`),
             y = `Actual Utilization Rate`)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightblue") +
  geom_point(aes(y = `Mean Predicted Probability`),
             color = "coral", size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Medical Visit Rate by Insurance Type",
       subtitle = "Bars = actual rate, points = model predicted probability",
       x = NULL, y = "Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

# parameter table
param_table <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c(
    "Hidden Layer Dimensions",
    "Embedding Dimensions",
    "Dropout Rate",
    "Weight Decay (L2)",
    "Learning Rate",
    "Optimizer",
    "Loss Function",
    "Batch Size",
    "Epochs",
    "Numeric Input Variables",
    "Normalization"
  ),
  Value = c(
    "64, 32, 16",
    "min(10, ceiling(categories / 3))",
    "0.6",
    "0.01",
    "0.001",
    "Adam",
    "Binary Cross-Entropy",
    "256",
    "75",
    "Age, Poverty Ratio",
    "Min-Max (0 to 1)"
  ),
  Description = c(
    "Three hidden layers with decreasing neuron counts, compressing the representation toward the binary output",
    "Each categorical variable is assigned an embedding dimension proportional to its cardinality, capped at 10",
    "Proportion of neurons randomly deactivated during each training step to prevent overfitting",
    "Strength of L2 regularization penalty applied to model weights to discourage memorization of training data",
    "Step size used by the Adam optimizer during each weight update",
    "Adaptive gradient descent algorithm that adjusts learning rates per parameter during training",
    "Standard loss function for binary classification that penalizes confident incorrect predictions more heavily",
    "Number of observations processed before each weight update during mini-batch gradient descent",
    "Number of complete passes through the training data during model training",
    "Continuous variables normalized separately and concatenated with embedding outputs before the hidden layers",
    "Continuous inputs rescaled to a 0 to 1 range using training set minimum and maximum values"
  )
)

kable(
  param_table,
  align   = c("l", "l", "l"),
  caption = "Deep Entity Embedding Neural Network - Model Parameters and Descriptions",
  col.names = c("Parameter", "Value", "Description")
)
```
